description.en: The giant isopod is a huge, deep-sea crustacean that looks like a giant pillbug.
description.zh: 大王具足虫是一种巨大的深海甲壳类动物，看起来就像一只巨大的西瓜虫。

anatomy.en: They can grow up to 30 centimeters long and have a hard, segmented shell to protect themselves. They have large, reflective eyes to see in the dark ocean depths and two pairs of antennas to feel their way around.
anatomy.zh: 它们可以长到30厘米长，有坚硬的分节外壳来保护自己。它们有一双可以反光的大眼睛，能在黑暗的深海中看清东西，还有两对触角用来感知周围环境。

ecology_and_behavior.en: These gentle giants are scavengers, meaning they eat dead animals that fall to the ocean floor, like whale carcasses. Because food is scarce in the deep sea, they can survive for a very long time without eating anything at all!
ecology_and_behavior.zh: 这些温和的庞然大物是食腐动物，这意味着它们吃掉到海底的动物尸体，比如鲸鱼的残骸。因为深海里食物稀少，它们可以在什么都不吃的情况下存活很长一段时间！

habitat_and_distribution.en: Giant isopods live at the bottom of the cold, dark Atlantic, Pacific, and Indian Oceans. They prefer the chilly depths of the sea floor, thousands of meters below the waves.
habitat_and_distribution.zh: 大王具足虫生活在寒冷、黑暗的大西洋、太平洋和印度洋的海底。它们喜欢在海浪下方数千米、冰冷的深海底部活动。
